subject: docs: add USER_GUIDE.md and update documentation references
body:
Created comprehensive end-user guide covering all SyncTone features:
getting started, chats, messaging, tone tags, reactions, replies,
read receipts, notifications, PWA installation, desktop layout, and
privacy. Updated README and CLAUDE.md to reference the new guide.

Tags: docs, user-guide, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
